title: Roderick_Ga_Ga's Pvp Pack
description: it's just a player who named Roderick_Ga_Ga made the pvp pack
body: This pack modifies the texture of the sword, making it a little shorter so that it doesn't block the view as much; it also modifies the texture of some of the squares. For those of you who are used to some weird texture packs, this one is not a big change from the original. The author recommends it for use in hypixel's bed wars (4v4v4v4).
